_publications._publicationTitle: Effects of Neurod1 Expression on Mouse and Human Schwannoma Cells.

_contextSnippet: While there was a trend towards higher irregularity of limb movement in the Nf2 cKO compared to control mice, these relatively minor differences did not reach significance due to wide interindividual variations
details: Showed trend towards higher irregularity of limb movement in Nf2 cKO compared to control mice, but differences did not reach significance due to wide interindividual variations
